title: Q1 Results 16th July Live: Wipro, Jio Financial, Tech Mahindra, Polycab India, BHEL, Piramal Finance, ITC Hotels, Ceat, WeWork India to announce Q1 results, Union Bank, Groww, HDBFS, HDFC AMC, HDFC Li
text:
financial advisor take note and business graphs and charts report show results of performance business on desk | Photo Credit: utah778

Q1 Results Today, 16th July 2026 Live Updates: Find all the latest Q1 results 2026 updates of Wipro, Jio Financial Services, Tech Mahindra, Polycab India, Bharat Heavy Electricals, Piramal Finance, 360 ONE WAM, ITC Hotels and CEAT.

Scroll down for more updates from businessline.

Angel One shares rose 1.7% in early trade to ₹349.40 on the NSE, while shares of Billionbrains Garage Ventures rose 2% to ₹220.98 before declining.

Shares of Union Bank of India traded flat at Rs 172.41 on the NSE, hitting a high of Rs 175.09. Its Q1FY27 net profit rose by 29.54 per cent year-on-year (y-o-y) at ₹5,332 crore

Brokerages cut target prices amid concerns over earnings outlook

HDB Financial shares jump over 4% after record Q1 profit, prompting brokerages to raise target prices amidst improved asset quality.

HDFC Life Insurance shares were down over 1% to Rs 561.70 on the NSE, despite 11.46 per cent year-on-year growth in consolidated net profit at ₹611.19 crore for the first quarter of this fiscal

Sensex gained 245.35 pts or 0.32% to 77,430.78 at 9.17 am after positive opening at 77,388.42 from the previous close of 77,185.43; and Nifty 50 was up 64.70 pts or 0.27% to 24,143.20.

HDFC Life Insurance on Wednesday reported 11.46 per cent year-on-year growth in consolidated net profit at ₹611.19 crore for the first quarter of this fiscal, backed by 15 per cent y-o-y growth in net premium income during the period

Union Bank of India reports 30% rise in Q1FY27 net profit, targeting $1.5-2 billion in fresh foreign deposits.

MRPL reports ₹915 crore profit in Q1 2026-27, with revenue nearly doubling to ₹41,609 crore and increased exports.

The board of Paytm to consider a proposal for Issuance of Bonus shares to the Shareholders of the Company, subject to necessary approvals on July 20 board meet

Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Limited Q1-Fy27

Revenue from Operations: Crossed a monumental milestones, reaching ₹1,555.5 crore, representing a robust 51% year-on-year increase against the ₹1,027.8 crore booked in Q1 FY26.

EBITDA Performance: Surged 56% YoY to ₹548.1 crore from ₹350.5 crore in the year-ago period. Enhanced efficiency expanded the EBITDA margin to an all-time high of 35.2% (up 114 bps YoY). Profit After Tax (PAT): More than doubled, escalating 103% YoY to ₹380.3 crore compared to ₹187.7 crore in Q1 FY26. The PAT margin hit a record 24.2%, capturing a massive 618 bps improvement from the base quarter.

Angel One has announced its Q1 FY27 results, reporting a strong quarter with standalone PAT of ₹2,707 crore, up 102.2% YoY, and gross revenue of ₹14,135 crore, up 26.2% YoY.

Credit - Average Client Funding Book reached a record high of ₹ 61.4 bn in Q1 ’27, higher by 45.9% YoY

Distribution - Unique SIPs registered during Q1 ’27 stood at 1.7 mn, lower by 10.3% YoY and Credit distribution in Q1 ‘27 stood at ₹ 5.3 bn, higher by 129.7% YoY

Wealth Management - AUM stood at ₹ 134.4 bn, higher by 165.3% YoY, with a client base of over 2,400 clients as of June 2026

Asset Management - AUM stood at ₹ 6.2 billion as of June 2026, higher by 81.4% YoY

Ionic Wealth, a tech-led wealth management platform, reported total Assets Under Management (AUM) of over ₹134 billion in Q1 FY27, clocking a quarter-on-quarter growth of 33.3%. This momentum was led by the UHNI Business, which has steadily built an AUM of ₹87.3 billion through a solution-led advisory approach. The firm continues to double down on a global suite of solutions and is introducing features based on new-age technologies keeping investor needs at the epicentre.

₹134+ Bn AUM comprises of: Active assets ₹127.8 Bn | Custody assets ₹6.6 Bn. 33.3% Q-o-Q growth as of June 30, 2026.

Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd Q1FY27 Results:-

EBITDA Margin 20.25% vs 19.43% YoY & 18.58% QoQ

Other Income 56.31 Cr vs 26.68 Cr YoY & 62.09 Cr QoQ

➤ Total QAAUM ₹9.35 Lakh Cr (+12.90% YoY & +0.82% QoQ)

➤ Closing AUM ₹9.32 Lakh Cr (+8.74% YoY & +10.41% QoQ)

➤ Actively Managed Equity-Oriented QAAUM ₹5.74 Lakh Cr (+15.65% YoY & +1.47% QoQ)

➤ Ratio of equity and non-equity oriented QAAUM is 66:34, compared to the industry ratio of 57:43 for the quarter

➤ Processed 17.2 million Systematic transactions worth ₹4,810 Cr during June 2026

➤ Distribution network comprised 1,10,000+ empanelled partners, serviced through 280 offices across 196 B-30 locations

➤ B-30 locations contributed 19.6% of total monthly average AUM for June 2026

➤ Individual investors contributed 69% of total monthly average AUM versus 61% for the industry

➤ Total live accounts stood at 3.11 Cr, while unique customers reached 1.71 Cr, representing 28% industry penetration

➤ Revenue ₹1,098.50 Cr (+14% YoY & +5% QoQ)

➤ Other Income ₹262.60 Cr (+13% YoY & +2245% QoQ)

➤ Total Income ₹1,361.10 Cr (+13% YoY & +28% QoQ)

➤ Operating Profit from Core AM Business ₹827.60 Cr (+10% YoY & +1% QoQ)

➤ PBT ₹1,090.20 Cr (+11% YoY & +31% QoQ)

ICICI Prudential Life reports 28% net profit growth to ₹386.18 crore in Q1FY27, driven by rising premium income.

The insurer’s net profit for the first quarter last fiscal stood at ₹747.08 crore. During Q1FY27, its net premium underwritten rose 17.70 per cent year-on-year at ₹6,603.73 crore from ₹5,610.52 crore in Q1FY26
